g.onclick: sendPrompt('/ (home): hero, featured articles from Strapi, quick booking CTA, doctor spotlight — Next.js SSG')
sendPrompt('/doctors và /doctors/[id]: list từ NestJS API, profile content từ Strapi doctor_page — merge bằng doctor_id field')
sendPrompt('/articles và /articles/[slug]: health blog từ Strapi, author linked to doctor_page, category filter — SSG + ISR revalidate 1h')
sendPrompt('/faq: accordion grouped by category (booking, video-call, records), data từ Strapi — SSG regenerate daily')
sendPrompt('/consent/[type]: latest consent form từ Strapi — patient phải đọc và ký trước booking telemedicine (P3 flow)')
sendPrompt('/portal/appointments: booking history, upcoming/past tabs, cancel button, join video call button for P3 sessions')
sendPrompt('/portal/records: medical records list, view test results, prescriptions, doctor notes — NestJS MedicalRecordModule')
sendPrompt('/portal/records/upload: patient uploads documents, FileModule stores to S3, record linked to patient_id')
sendPrompt('/portal/notifications: in-app notification feed từ P3, mark as read, filter unread — uses notification_logs table')
sendPrompt('/portal/profile: patient profile edit, phone, address, date of birth — PATCH /users/me from P1')
